title: EQ - Custom EQ, save a custom EQ, change some values, Save EQ
scenario: Verify that re-saving a custom EQ with modified values correctly updates and persists the new positions/values.
steps: 2. Create or load a custom EQ preset.
4. Change some values (e.g., adjust frequency bands, gain, or Q-factor).
6. Close and reopen the EQ interface (or reload the preset).
7. Verify that the new positions/values are saved correctly.
expected: The updated EQ values/positions are correctly saved and persist after reopening or reloading the preset.
